name: Once Upon a Time in Queens
original_name: Once Upon a Time in Queens
overview: The story of the 1986 Mets, one of the most dominating, infamous, and magical teams of all time. The series traces the team's origins back to the late 1970s. The story of their triumph may have been magical, but the tale of their fall was inevitable.

trailers.title: Once Upon a Time in Queens: The Wild Ride of the ’86 Mets | ESPN 30 for 30
